steps.title: Keep the repeated group
steps.content: The question asks for $3-5x$, and that exact group appears on both sides. Keep the group together instead of solving for $x$.

steps.title: Isolate the group
steps.content: Start with the equation: $$ 8-6(3-5x)=21-7(3-5x) $$ Subtract $8$ from both sides, then add $7(3-5x)$ to both sides: $$ -6(3-5x)=13-7(3-5x) $$ $$ 3-5x=13 $$ The answer is 13.
